how_it_works.title: Describe Your Store
how_it_works.description: Enter the name and what you're selling — AI creates the store structure and design.

how_it_works.title: Add Products
how_it_works.description: Upload photos, set prices, and fill in descriptions through a simple editor.

how_it_works.title: Connect Payment and Launch
how_it_works.description: Choose a payment system and delivery service — the store is ready to operate.

faq.question: How do I create an online store from scratch?
faq.answer: Register on Promto, describe your store, add products, and click Publish — everything is ready.

faq.question: What delivery services can I connect?
faq.answer: CDEK, Russian Post, Boxberry, and other popular delivery services are available for integration.

faq.question: Do I need to register as a sole proprietor for an online store?
faq.answer: To accept online payments, registering as a sole proprietor or self-employed is recommended. Promto works with any status.

faq.question: Can I start without products — create the store first?
faq.answer: Yes, first create the structure and design, then add products gradually.

faq.question: How do I promote an online store?
faq.answer: Built-in SEO, advertising system integrations, and blog capability help attract traffic.

faq.question: What is Promto and why choose it?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. Unlike regular builders, AI creates all content and structure for you.

cta_mid_subtitle: No code, no programmers — just your products and sales.
cta_final_subtitle: Create an online store for free on Promto and start selling.
